doc_title: Florida Department of State 2025 Voter Eligibility Clarification Memo
label: fabricated
reason: The memo contradicts the actual Jones v. DeSantis (11th Cir. 2020) ruling upholding Florida's LFO requirement and no such Division of Elections directive eliminating LFO checks exists.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 92
REASON: This contradicts actual Florida law (Amendment 4 and §98.0751 still require LFO payment per Jones v. DeSantis, 11th Cir. 2020), cites a non-existent case posture, and no such DOE memo reversing LFO requirements exists.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 92
REASON: The memo contradicts the actual Jones v. DeSantis (11th Cir. 2020) ruling upholding Florida's LFO requirement and no such Division of Elections directive eliminating LFO checks exists.
